channel.title: AEO on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in AEO on Junho Lee

item.title: GEO and AEO Guide to Bypassing Javascript Barriers in Data Scraping Pipelines
item.description: Learn how to build resilient scraping pipelines using headless browsers and bypass strategies to overcome dynamic JS rendering and bot detection.

item.title: Optimizing for AI Overviews: AEO and GEO Strategy
item.description: A practical guide to configuring robots.txt and optimizing web pages for citations in AI Overviews, ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity.

item.title: 5. AEO - Why Coding Agents Read Documentation Differently
item.description: If GEO optimizes for consumer AI, AEO optimizes for coding agents. This article covers document length constraints, llms.txt, skill.md, and AGENTS.md — the files that matter.
